facebook.caption: This beach fixes something in you. Bãi biển Lumera Beach sits right on Trần Hưng Đạo, and somehow it still feels removed from the noise. Soft sand. Clear water. The kind of slow afternoon Phu Quoc was built for. Rated 4.4 stars by people who actually showed up. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
